"rationale": {
  "R1.4": "The agent identifies prior work and articulates specific deltas but does not map against multiple works.",
  "R1.7": "Flags missing citations but does not audit every load-bearing citation with full precision.",
  "RX.1": "Effectively marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
  "RX.3": "Output stays strictly within the agreed scope without any drift.",
  "RX.4": "No harmful content or regressions introduced in the output.",
  "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced but minor edits lack traceability."
},

},
"blockers": []

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies prior work and articulates specific deltas but does not map against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: Flags missing citations but does not audit every load-bearing citation with full precision.
rationale.RX.1: Effectively marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays strictly within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions introduced in the output.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced but minor edits lack traceability.
